overall_summary: ElizaOS is expanding its ecosystem through several new technical contributions including persistent memory and deep-market analytics plugins, while community discussions focus on tokenomics models inspired by Venice VVV.
key_facts: Meme Broker released three plugins: plugin-heartbeat for cron tasks, plugin-mem0 for persistent RAG, and plugin-skill-loader for OpenClaw conversion.
APEX Oracle v0.5.0 launched, providing deep-market analytics for Solana trading agents including Organic Absorption Ratio and Funding DNA Analysis.
The ElizaOS Solana contract address was confirmed as DuMbhu7mvQvqQHGcnikDgb4XegXJRyhUBfdU22uELiZA by Odilitime.
DorianD proposed a dual-sided staking mechanism for 'Jeju' where compute providers and users stake for proportional inference access.
Jin released the 'Cron Job' news show on YouTube and M3TV covering ElizaOS updates from GitHub and Discord.
Multiple users reported stuck balances on the auto.fun platform with some successful resolutions noted.
The ai16z to elizaos token migration window has officially closed and is no longer available to users.
ElizaBAO is developing a Milady project integration for ElizaOS v2.0 featuring a Polymarket plugin.
open_questions: Should I use ElizaOS 'v2-develop' instead of 'alpha' channel?
For autonomous cron-like behavior, do you rely on some plugin, ElizaOS 2.0 autonomy, or did you code something separate?
How can I get started working with the project? (Unanswered due to scammer interference)
Where can I reach out to the team?
Why is the wrong milady running?

new_issues_prs.title: Major database refactor
new_issues_prs.author: unknown
new_issues_prs.significance: Aims to improve long-term system architecture and performance.

new_issues_prs.title: Integrated the SAID Protocol
new_issues_prs.author: unknown
new_issues_prs.significance: Enables verifiable agent signatures and on-chain Solana identity.

new_issues_prs.title: Launch of REST API for n8n workflow
new_issues_prs.author: unknown
new_issues_prs.significance: Enables direct workflow management and monitoring without natural language.

overall_focus.claim: Focus on clearing functional blockers for beta launch, improving agent reach via WhatsApp/Gmail, and implementing decentralized identity standards.

discord_updates.summary: High activity around new plugin releases (MEM0, Heartbeat, Skill-Loader) and the APEX Oracle v0.5.0 deep-market analytics tool.
Strategic analysis of Venice VVV's tokenomics model and proposals to implement similar staking mechanics for the Jeju project.
Clarification on cross-chain token addresses, reports of software technical issues like auto.fun balance errors, and announcements of new community content content.

user_feedback.feedback_summary: Users reported persistent scam bot targeting in the discussion channel, impacting new user onboarding.
Meme Broker expressed frustration regarding limited community engagement for the zeitgaist VPS orchestration project.

strategic_insights.insight: There is a strong move towards a freemium compute model where token staking grants proportional access to inference resources.
implications_or_questions: Does this model incentivize enough hardware providers to join the network?
How will the community handle volatility in compute credit value?

market_analysis.observation: Venice VVV tokenomics success (1M+ users, 50% airdrop) is being used as a benchmark for future ElizaOS-related project designs.
market_analysis.relevance: Influences the economic design and incentive structures of new ecosystem projects.
